paracetamol.name: Paracetamol
common_uses: Placeholder profile commonly associated with pain or fever discussions; verify indication and patient suitability.
pharmacist_notes: Confirm formulation, strength, route, and maximum daily exposure using approved references.
Check for duplicate ingredient exposure in combination products.
Assess patient-specific risk factors before counseling.
counseling_points: Follow the final pharmacist-approved label directions.
Ask the pharmacist before combining with other medicines that may contain the same ingredient.
Seek pharmacist guidance if directions are unclear.
safety_considerations: Confirm age, allergies, pregnancy status, current medications, and relevant organ-function concerns before use.

ibuprofen.name: Ibuprofen
common_uses: Placeholder profile commonly associated with pain, inflammation, or fever discussions; verify indication and patient suitability.
pharmacist_notes: Review allergy history, gastrointestinal risk, kidney-related risk, pregnancy status, and current medicines.
Confirm pharmacist-approved directions and duration before counseling.
counseling_points: Follow the final pharmacist-approved label directions.
Ask the pharmacist about use with other medicines.
Report uncertainty or concerning symptoms to the pharmacist.
safety_considerations: Missing allergy, pregnancy, kidney, gastrointestinal, or medication context should trigger pharmacist review.

amoxicillin.name: Amoxicillin
common_uses: Placeholder profile for pharmacist review workflows; verify indication, dose, and duration with approved references.
pharmacist_notes: Verify dose, formulation, duration, and patient-specific factors.
Check current medications and local policy before patient-facing guidance.
counseling_points: Follow the final pharmacist-approved label directions.
Ask the pharmacist what to do if a dose is missed.
Contact the pharmacist if new concerns arise.
safety_considerations: Unknown allergy status, unclear indication, or incomplete directions should trigger pharmacist review.

cetirizine.name: Cetirizine
common_uses: Placeholder profile commonly associated with allergy symptom support discussions; verify patient context and product details.
pharmacist_notes: Review age, allergy history, current medications, pregnancy or breastfeeding status when relevant, and kidney-related context when relevant.
Confirm pharmacist-approved directions and formulation before counseling.
counseling_points: Follow the final pharmacist-approved label directions.
Ask the pharmacist before combining with other allergy, cold, sleep, or sedating products.
safety_considerations: Missing patient context, unclear product details, or alertness concerns should trigger pharmacist review.

loratadine.name: Loratadine
common_uses: Placeholder profile commonly associated with allergy symptom support discussions; verify patient context and product details.
pharmacist_notes: Review age, allergy history, current medications, pregnancy or breastfeeding status when relevant, and liver-related or kidney-related context when relevant.
Confirm pharmacist-approved directions and formulation before counseling.
counseling_points: Follow the final pharmacist-approved label directions.
Ask the pharmacist before combining with other allergy, cold, or multi-symptom products.
safety_considerations: Missing patient context, unclear product details, or multiple product use should trigger pharmacist review.

omeprazole.name: Omeprazole
common_uses: Placeholder profile commonly associated with acid-related symptom support discussions; verify patient context and product details.
pharmacist_notes: Review symptom duration, current medications, age, pregnancy or breastfeeding status when relevant, and warning symptoms.
Confirm pharmacist-approved directions, duration, and formulation before counseling.
counseling_points: Follow the final pharmacist-approved label directions.
Ask the pharmacist about timing, duration, and formulation-specific instructions for the confirmed product.
safety_considerations: Warning symptoms, recurring symptoms, missing duration, or missing medication context should trigger pharmacist review.

salbutamol.name: Salbutamol
common_uses: Placeholder profile commonly associated with reliever inhaler counseling workflows; verify device and patient context.
pharmacist_notes: Review symptom pattern, current respiratory medicines, device type, allergies, pregnancy status when relevant, and technique.
Confirm pharmacist-approved directions and device-specific instructions before counseling.
counseling_points: Follow the final pharmacist-approved label directions.
Ask the pharmacist to review inhaler technique and device-specific questions when appropriate.
safety_considerations: Worsening symptoms, frequent symptoms, unclear reliever use, or missing device context should trigger pharmacist review.
